mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl (self_process_no, self_process_group, self_process_type, clos_type, feedback_msg, occur_time, feedback_time, ticket_id, ticket_type, alarmno, clos_status, clos_time) VALUES (nextval('nia.seq_self_process_no'), #{selfProcessGroup}, #{selfProcessType}, 'A', null, #{occur_time}::timestamp, null, #{ticketId}, #{ticketType}, #{alarmno}, 'N', null)
mapper.select: select self_process_no, self_process_group, self_process_type, clos_type, feedback_msg, occur_time, feedback_time, ticket_id, ticket_type, alarmno, clos_status, clos_time from nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl pd where pd.clos_type = 'A' or pd.clos_type = 'M' and pd.ticket_id = #{num} or pd.alarmno = #{num}
select sa.alarmno, sa.alarmtime, sa.node_num, sa.node_nm, sa.alarmmsg, sa.alarmlvl, sa.etc, sa.rule_id, sa.alarmloc, sa.status from rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst sa where sa.alarmno = #{num}

select sop_id, alarmno, fault_classify, fault_type, fault_detail_content, etc_content, status, proc_status, alarm_occur_time, handling_fin_user, handling_fin_time, alarmloc from nia.tb_syslog_sop where alarmno = #{alarmno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nia.tb_syslog_sop (sop_id, alarmno, fault_classify, fault_type, fault_detail_content, etc_content, status, proc_status, alarm_occur_time, handling_fin_user, handling_fin_time, alarmloc) VALUES (nextval('nia.seq_syslog_sop_id'), #{alarmno}, #{faultClassify}, #{faultType}, #{faultDetailContent}, #{etcContent}, #{status}, #{procStatus}, #{alarmOccurTime}::timestamp, #{handlingFinUser}, now(), #{alarmloc})
mapper.update: UPDATE NIA.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl SET CLOS_TIME = now() , CLOS_STATUS = 'Y' WHERE CLOS_STATUS NOT IN ('Y') AND SELF_PROCESS_TYPE = 'S' AND ALARMNO = #{alarmno}
